Short description of property. 1. all that freehold land being land forming part of 143 north street romford RM1 1ED registered at the land registry under title number EGL182062;. 2. all that freehold land being land lying to the south west of north street, romford registered at the land registry under title number EGL150131;. 3. all that freehold land being land and buildings lying on the south west side of north street, romford registered at the land registry under title number EGL194191;. 4. all that freehold land being land at the back of 143 north street, romford RM1 1ED registered at the land registry under title number EGL143404;. 5. all that freehold land being 143 north street, romford RM1 1ED registered at the land registry under title number EGL138145;. 6. all that freehold land being land lying to the south west side of north street, romford registered at the land registry under title number EGL190572;. 7. all that freehold land being rom joinery works, 143 north street, romford RM1 1ED registered at the land registry under title number EGL412375; and. 8. all that freehold land being land lying to the south west of north street, romford registered at the land registry under title number EGL138159.
